title: Clarion Communication Management Ltd ransomware incident

extortion.description: The Clarion Group brings together a team of people with a shared passion for technology – and the advantages it can bring to Business. We have spent nearly 20 years building up and maintaining a detailed understanding of the evolving ICT landscape and are keen to share this. We believe in educating our Customers as to the pros and cons of different solutions rather than simply foisting these upon them, allowing for a more informed and consultative decision-making process.
